plans.name: Starter
plans.target_audience: Early stage setups, individual developers, and small teams tracking baseline metrics.

plans.name: Growth
features: Priority email and Discord server support (4-hour turnaround time)
plans.target_audience: Rapidly scaling businesses needing real-time operational syncs and higher throughput.

plans.name: Enterprise
features: Unlimited API throughput with dedicated rate limits
Audit logs retention for security compliance
Dedicated Service Level Agreement (SLA) guaranteeing 99.99% uptime
plans.target_audience: Large organizations demanding top-tier security compliance, user provisioning abstractions, and high availability guarantees.
